name: Finwise Bancorp
business: FinWise Bancorp is a bank holding company providing commercial and retail banking products and services, including loan origination (SBA, commercial leases, residential real estate, strategic program loans, consumer loans) and deposit services to consumers and small businesses nationwide. It operates through three segments: traditional banking, banking-as-a-service (BaaS), and treasury & administration. The BaaS segment provides lending, card, and payment solutions to fintech brands.

exposures.sentence: The BaaS segment provides lending, card and payments solutions nationally to fintech brands.
